_comment: This JSON file cannot have comments per JSON spec. This key is the documentation.
_purpose: OpenAPI baseline for openapi-diff machinery. Stores the last-reviewed API schema for breaking change detection. Updated with: python skills/backend/openapi-diff.py --mode update. Per spec §26.12 item 391.
_initial: Empty baseline at template initialization. Populated after first initialization PR is merged and API is running.
